title: gpt-image-2
prompt: Primary request: Flat editorial technical infographic on deep navy background with warm terracotta and gold accents and subtle paper texture. Three stacked horizontal layers. Bottom layer labeled 'LAYER 1: tools/ + pipeline_defs/' with small module icons labeled 'seedream_image.py', 'seedance_ark.py', 'animated-explainer.yaml'. Middle layer labeled 'LAYER 2: skills/' with icons labeled 'asset-director.md', 'stage-director.md'. Top layer labeled 'LAYER 3: .agents/skills/' with icons labeled 'seedream/SKILL.md', 'volcengine-tts/SKILL.md'. A stylized Agent figure on the left reads all three layers; arrows flow from layers to a central 'EXECUTE' node. Clean vector shapes, no photo realism, no UI controls, no extra text beyond labels.
